title: AgentSite contracts
summary: Repo-local contracts define the site mission, safe claims, approval boundaries, and maintenance rules.

title: QA command suite
summary: The package scripts run contract, claims, SEO, link, artifact, build, and visual checks before handoff.

title: Recipe registry
summary: Reusable archetypes and section recipes let future agents improve sites without reinventing the wheel.

title: Deploy verifier
summary: Live URL verification checks expected page content after GitHub Pages deployment succeeds.
